property.tellus.world_scale.name: World Scale

property.tellus.max_altitude.name: Max Altitude
property.tellus.min_altitude.name: Min Altitude
property.tellus.world_scale.tooltip: The amount of meters in real life representing one block in-game
property.tellus.dem_provider.tooltip: Selects the elevation data source. Automatic prefers swissALTI3D in Switzerland and Liechtenstein coverage, prefers AHN in the Netherlands, prefers CANElevation in Canada, prefers Norway DTM1 in mainland Norway, prefers Japan GSI in Japan, uses ArcticDEM/REMA in polar regions, uses USGS 3DEP across the U.S., uses Copernicus as the worldwide 30 m+ baseline, and only retains Terrain Tiles where its native resolution is finer than 30 m.
property.tellus.dem_automatic.tooltip: When enabled, all DEM sources stay on and Tellus uses the full automatic DEM resolver.
tellus.hma_access.button.tooltip: Disabled while provider-side issues with the HMA 8 m DEM are being worked on.
tellus.hma_access.token.tooltip: Stored locally on this computer and used only for NSIDC High Mountain Asia access
tellus.hma_access.instruction.test_befor: Save becomes available only after the current token passes the test.
tellus.hma_access.status.test_success: Token works for protected HMA data.
tellus.hma_access.status.test_before_sav: Test the current token successfully before saving it.
tellus.hma_access.status.test_failed_aut: Earthdata token was rejected for HMA access.
tellus.hma_access.status.network_failed: Could not reach the HMA test endpoint.
tellus.hma_access.status.save_failed: Could not save the Earthdata token.
tellus.hma_access.status.token_missing: Paste a bearer token before testing.
tellus.preview.info.button.tooltip: Show terrain preview information and auto-adjust controls
tellus.preview.info.title: Terrain Info
property.tellus.terrestrial_height_scale: Elevation multiplier from meters to blocks for terrain above sea level
property.tellus.oceanic_height_scale.too: Elevation multiplier from meters to blocks for terrain below sea level
property.tellus.height_offset.tooltip: Vertical offset applied to terrain heights
property.tellus.sea_level.tooltip: Waterline height in blocks without shifting overall terrain. Automatic follows height offset
property.tellus.max_altitude.tooltip: Upper world limit in blocks; set to Automatic at far left
property.tellus.min_altitude.tooltip: Lower world limit in blocks; set to Automatic at far left
property.tellus.river_lake_shoreline_ble: Distance in blocks to blend river and lake shorelines
property.tellus.ocean_shoreline_blend.to: Distance in blocks to blend ocean shorelines
property.tellus.shoreline_blend_cliff_li: Skips shoreline blending on steep slopes
category.tellus.dem_providers.name: DEM Providers
tellus.dem_provider.force_disabled.terra: Terrain Tiles is required while Copernicus is off.
tellus.dem_provider.force_disabled.coper: Copernicus is required while Terrain Tiles is off.

property.tellus.distant_horizons_render_: Choose full chunks, fast LODs, or ultra fast LODs

property.tellus.realtime_time.name: Live Time
property.tellus.realtime_time.tooltip: Syncs in-game time to the real-world time at your location
property.tellus.realtime_weather.name: Real-Time Weather
property.tellus.realtime_weather.tooltip: Uses real-world weather for rain, thunder, and snow
property.tellus.historical_snow.name: Historical Snow Coverage
property.tellus.historical_snow.tooltip: Applies snow based on recent snowfall and temperature history
property.tellus.historical_snow.rework.t: This feature is currently being reworked
property.tellus.voxy_chunk_pregen_enable: Generates full chunks around players so Voxy can ingest and render them
property.tellus.voxy_chunk_pregen_max_ra: Maximum chunk radius generated around each player for Voxy ingestion
property.tellus.voxy_chunk_pregen_chunks: Maximum chunks requested per server tick for Voxy pre-generation
property.tellus.locked.name: This feature is not currently available
property.tellus.enable_roads.name: Enable Roads
property.tellus.enable_buildings.name: Enable Buildings
property.tellus.enable_water.name: Enable Water
property.tellus.enable_roads.tooltip: Generate OpenStreetMap road features where data is available
property.tellus.enable_buildings.tooltip: Generate Overture building footprints and 3D parts where data is available
property.tellus.enable_water.tooltip: Use Overture/OSM water when enabled. Leave off to keep ESA water
property.tellus.min_building_area.name: Allow Minimum Building Area
property.tellus.min_building_area.toolti: Allow Minimum area limit for generated buildings (blocks)
tellus.openstreetmaps_features.scale_lim: Roads and buildings are disabled because they are only available when World Scale is 1:100 (100 m/block) or finer.
property.tellus.enable_roads.scale_limit: Disabled because roads are only available when World Scale is 1:100 (100 m/block) or finer.
property.tellus.enable_buildings.scale_l: Disabled because buildings are only available when World Scale is 1:100 (100 m/block) or finer.
